entity.label: Bozrah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A Moabite city in the “plain country” (Jer. 48:24), i.e., on the high level down on the east of the Dead Sea. It is probably the modern Buzrah.

nodes.label: Bozrah
nodes.description: A Moabite city in the “plain country” (Jer. 48:24), i.e., on the high level down on the east of the Dead Sea. It is probably the modern Buzrah.

verses.text: And upon Kerioth, and upon Bozrah, and upon all the cities of the land of Moab, far or near.
